welcome.title: Sales Management
welcome.description:
This is where you manage all your dealership's sales. You can approve, reject, and review each transaction.

Let's see how it works.

header.title: Sales Header
header.description: General section info. The description changes automatically based on the active tab.

tabs.title: Status Tabs
tabs.description:
Filter your sales by status:

Pending: Sales awaiting your approval
Approved: Confirmed sales
Rejected: Rejected sales
All: Complete view of all sales

table.title: Sales Table
table.description:
Detail of each sale: date, vehicle, customer, price, seller, commission, and status.

From pending sales you can approve or reject, adjust commissions, and add notes.

Approved sales are automatically reflected in your financial reports.

finish.title: All Set!
finish.description: You now know the sales management tools. Remember to regularly review pending sales to keep your operations up to date.
